accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text and the FWS rule.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; description of the rule's dual classification is accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution's purpose as disapproving the FWS lesser prairie-chicken rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: CRA disapproval does not amend existing statutes.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the single operative provision: disapproval and nullification of the FWS rule.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service and the rule's Federal Register citation.

correct_figures.why: Correctly cites 87 Fed. Reg. 72674, November 25, 2022, and May 3, 2023 Senate passage date.
